metadata.relation_to_case: Independent Director, VedaCorp Solutions Pvt. Ltd.

content: I am Ravi Nair, an independent director of VedaCorp since 2020. I was on medical leave in Goa from February 28 to March 18, 2023, recovering from knee surgery. I did not access any digital systems during this period. My login credentials were never shared. I did not sign the board minutes dated March 10, 2023. I only became aware of the alleged fraud in August 2023 when the MCA audit was announced. I have never received any payment from VedaCorp or its associates. I was never contacted for approval of vendor contracts. The digital signature on the minutes is a forgery. I have filed a complaint with the Cyber Crime Cell regarding unauthorized use of my credentials. I demand the resignation of all involved directors.
